title: Fee Structure Overview (2024-25)
content: University fee structure for A.Y. 2024-25 was approved on May 6, 2024. Fees are generally payable in two equal installments: the first by July 22, 2024, and the second by January 2, 2025.

title: SOE Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Engineering (SOE) total annual fees: B.Tech CSE (Cyber Security / Software Engineering) Rs 300,000. B.Tech Mechanical (Automobile / 3D Printing & Design) Rs 250,000. B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Rs 300,000. B.Tech Biotechnology / Biomedical Engineering Rs 250,000. B.Tech Robotics and Automation Engineering Rs 250,000. B.Tech CSE (Virtual and Augmented Reality) Rs 350,000. B.Tech CSE (Cyber Forensic & Info Security) Rs 350,000. B.Tech Aeronautical / Aerospace / Avionics Engineering Rs 300,000. Integrated B.Tech + M.Tech (Aerospace / Defence Tech) Rs 350,000. M.Tech (Bio Engineering / AI & ML / Robotics) Rs 230,000. M.Tech (Space Technology / Infrastructure Engineering) Rs 250,000.

title: SOM Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Management (SOM) total annual fees: BBA (Sales & Marketing, Finance, Fintech, etc.) Rs 230,000. BBA (Business Analytics, Brand Management, etc.) Rs 140,250. BBA Honors (International Finance & Data Analytics) Rs 300,000. BBA Aviation Rs 200,000. MBA (HR, Finance, Operations, Marketing, etc.) Rs 350,000. MBA (Business Analytics, Retail Management, etc.) Rs 238,000. MBA (Sports Management, AI & Data Science, International Business) Rs 1,000,000. MBA Aviation Rs 300,000.

title: SOD Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: School of Design (SOD) total annual fees: B.Des (UI/UX, Visual Communication, Fashion) Rs 350,000. B.Des Transportation Design Rs 500,000. M.Des Transportation Design Rs 700,000. M.Des UI/UX Rs 500,000. PG Diploma in Digital Modelling Rs 275,000.

title: Other Schools Fee Structure (2024-25)
content: Other schools and programs annual fees: School of Law BA LLB, LLB, and LLM are Rs 200,000 per year. School of Liberal Arts BA Liberal Arts-Hons and MA International Studies are Rs 230,000 per year. School of Architecture B.Arch and M.Arch (Environmental) are Rs 200,000 per year. School of Hotel Management B.Sc Hospitality and Hotel Administration is Rs 175,000 and M.Sc is Rs 200,000. School of Film and Media B.Sc Sound Engineering is Rs 300,000, Film Making is Rs 200,000, Animation and Journalism are Rs 155,000. Ph.D. programs in Engineering, Law, Management, and Design are Rs 200,000 per year.

title: Admissions Contact Directory
content: Admissions hotlines: General Admissions +91-8956487911 / +91-8956487916. School of Engineering +91-8956487911 / +91-9175067360. School of Management +91-9075153542 / +91-8956487916. School of Design +91-9075153542 / +91-8956487916. School of Law +91-9175069861 / +91-9028954966. School of Hotel Management +91-7906285013. Hostel Inquiries +91-8087778799.

title: Email Directory
content: Email directory: Central Admissions admissions@adypu.edu.in. General Info info@adypu.edu.in. Student Service Division (SSD) ssd@adypu.edu.in. Engineering Specific soe.info@adypu.edu.in.

title: Office Hours
content: Office hours: Monday to Friday 9:30 AM - 5:30 PM IST. Admissions Saturday 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM IST. Admissions Sunday 9:30 AM - 5:30 PM IST.

title: Scholarships
content: Scholarships: Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship. Pune Pride Scholarship. ADYPU Divyang Excellence Scholarship (for students with disabilities). Beti Padhao Scholarship (for female students). Khelo India Sports Delight Scholarship. ADYPU Entrance Talent Hunt Scholarship.

title: University Officials and Deans
content: Heads of ADYPU: Registrar Dr. Sudhakar Shinde. Incharge Controller of Examinations Dr. Sunil Ingole. Director School of Online and Distance Education Dr. Kamaljeet Kaur Siddhu. Dean School of Engineering & School of Defence Dr. Prashant Kumbharkar. Dean School of Management Dr. Chetna Mehta. Dean School of Design Ar. Aparna Mhetras. Dean School of Law & School of Liberal Arts Dr. Sunny Thomas. Dean School of Science & School of Film and Media Dr. Sushanta Das. Associate Dean School of Hospitality and Hotel Management Dr. Atul Ramgade. Dean School of Doctoral Studies Dr. Radhika Menon. Dean Center for Advanced Indian Science KM Sinha. Dean School of Architecture Prof. Rajaram Golgire. Dean Student Service Division Dr. Vijay Kulkarni. Director IQAC Dr. Deepa Joshi. Director SPCR Dr. Santosh Borde. Dean Planning and Development Dr. Sachin M. Rajas. Head of Sports Dr. Heena Sidhu.

title: About ADYPU
content: Ajeenkya DY Patil University (ADYPU) in Pune is an innovation-focused institution offering undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs. Academic schools include Engineering, Management, Design, Hotel Management, Law, Liberal Arts, Architecture, Film and Media, Science, Allied Health Sciences, and Online and Distance Education. Key educational features include the T-Shaped Professional curriculum, global partnerships with universities in the US, UK, and Europe, and innovation and entrepreneurship centers like DRIF (Design, Research and Innovation Foundation) and the Entrepreneurship and Innovation Centre.

title: Recent Highlights (2025-2026)
content: Recent highlights (2025-2026): Ph.D. Admissions Open 2026. 10th Convocation celebrated in December 2025. School of Management recognized in the Times B-School Survey 2026. International engagements including with the Vice President of Guyana.

title: SOE Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Engineering undergraduate programs: B.Tech CSE specializations in Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Software Engineering, Fintech, Virtual and Augmented Reality, and Cyber Forensic & Information Security. Information Technology specializations in Mobile Application & Information Security, Cloud Technology, Information Security, and Computer Science & Technology (AI and Digital Systems). Biotechnology specializations in Medical Biotechnology, Food Technology, and Bioinformatics. Mechanical Engineering specializations in Automobile Engineering and 3D Printing and Design. Other B.Tech programs include Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Biomedical Engineering, Robotics and Automation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Avionics Engineering, Smart and Sustainable Energy, and Electronics and Computer Engineering. BCA (Hons) specializations include Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Blockchain and Distributed Computing, Data Analytics and Business Intelligence, Information Technology (Cyber Security / Cloud Computing / Media), Full Stack Development, Web App Development, Game Development, and Internet of Things.

title: SOE Admissions
content: School of Engineering admission and scholarships: Process includes the ADYPU Common Entrance Test (ACET) followed by a counseling session and personal interview. Scholarships include the Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship, Pune Pride Scholarship, and various excellence and sports-based awards.

title: SOM Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Management undergraduate programs: BBA specializations in Business & Strategy (Entrepreneurship and Innovation, International Business, Business Analytics, Business and Process Excellence), Finance (Financial Management and Corporate Strategies, Finance, Financial Markets, Fintech, Fintech and Digital Banking, Banking and Financial Services), Marketing & Sales (Sales and Marketing, Integrated Marketing and Communications, Brand Management, Online Media and e-Marketing), Operations & Services (Logistics and Supply Chain Management, e-Commerce and Logistics, Retail Management, Aviation, Sports Management), and Advanced Studies (Decision Sciences). Additional degrees: BBA Honours, BBA in International Finance, and iB.Com (International Accounting).

title: SOM Placements and Admissions
content: School of Management placement and admissions: Highest package Rs 9 LPA and average package Rs 5.5 LPA. Admission process requires registration for the ADYPU Common Entrance Test (ACET), followed by a counseling session and personal interview. Scholarships: 11 different scholarship categories are available, including the Ajeenkya Genius and Pune Pride scholarships.

title: SOD Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Design Bachelor of Design (B.Des) specializations: UI/UX, Visual Communication, Product Design, Transportation Design, Fashion Design, and Interior Design.

title: SOD Admissions
content: School of Design admission details: Candidates must register for the ADYPU Common Entrance Test (ACET). For design programs, a Studio Test is required along with the personal interview and portfolio review (SOP). Students are eligible for university-wide scholarships such as the Ajeenkya Genius Scholarship and Pune Pride Scholarship.

title: SOL Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Law undergraduate programs: BA LLB, BBA LLB, and LLB.

title: SOHM Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Hotel Management undergraduate program: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration (B.Sc. HHA) with specializations in Culinary Arts, Hotel Management, and Travel and Tourism.

title: SOLA Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Liberal Arts Bachelor of Arts majors: English, International Studies, Psychology, and Economics. Specializations include English Language and Literature, Economics, Psychology, Politics and International Relations, Journalism and Mass Communication, and Sociology.

title: SOFM Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Film and Media undergraduate programs: Bachelor of Science (Hons.) in Film and Media with specializations in Sound Engineering, Film Making, Animation and Visual Effects, and Game Art and Design. Bachelor of Arts (Hons.) in Journalism & Media Production.

title: SOA Undergraduate Programs
content: School of Architecture undergraduate program: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch), a five-year degree program.

title: Campus Life Facilities
content: Campus life facilities at ADYPU: main auditorium, amphitheater, on-campus cafeteria, landscape gardens, outdoor Sports Facility Center, Indoor Sports Arena, smart classrooms, IT center, open study spaces, hostel facilities, health center, Biodiversity Park, student clubs, and the National Service Scheme (NSS).

title: Campus Events
content: ADYPU events include #TECH, Alchemy, Impetus, Ablaze, Chatori Galli, National Moot Court, Y20 Festival, Convocation Ceremony, Viksit Bharat Yuva Connect programs, industry bootcamps under DRIF, and international conferences such as the IEEE International Conference. Event registration is usually through the ERP Portal for current students, the ADYPU Events Page for external participants, and campus registration desks near the Cafeteria or Main Auditorium during lunch hours (12:30 PM - 1:30 PM).

title: Student Council Overview
content: Student Council ADYPU: Instagram handle adypu.studentcouncil. Email info.studencouncil@adypu.edu.in. The council serves as the bridge between students and university leadership and works under the guidance of the Dean of Student Service Division (SSD).

title: Student Council Office Bearers
content: Student Council key roles: President Mr. Devesh Dinesh Pandey. President / Rotaract Club Head Mr. Yash Yogesh Somani. Vice Presidents Ms. Ritul Dhanwade, Ms. Rajshree Sahay, Ms. Piyul Tejaswini Khare. Secretaries Ms. Akansha Nair, Mr. Pratham Sharma, Mr. Atharva Gutte. Cultural Heads Ms. Mahima Chakraborty, Ms. Achal Guha, Mr. Varad Prashant Chavan. Sports Heads Ms. Tanishka Pramod Salunke, Mr. Lokala Charan Naga Karthik, Mr. Prajwal Sharma. Placement Heads Mr. Varad Vijay Khopkar, Ms. Durva Mitesh Patil, Mr. Om Jeughale. Hostel Representatives Ms. Ishita Thulkar and Mr. Bhavya Daga. Media Co-ordinators Ms. Arsheen Khan, Mr. Aman Harshavardhan, Mr. Aayush Amar Singh.

title: Student Council Eligibility & Selection
content: Student Council election and selection: Eligibility usually requires a minimum CGPA of 7.0 or above and a clean disciplinary record. Selection includes campus campaigning, student voting, and faculty interviews. Investiture Ceremony is typically held in August or September.

title: SSD Quick Facts
content: SSD stands for Student Service Division. The SSD acts as the primary support hub for student welfare, extracurricular coordination, event management, grievance redressal, disciplinary oversight, hostel support, health and wellness linkage, document support, and campus tours. Leadership: Dr. Vijay Kulkarni (Dean - Student Service Division). SSD email: ssd@adypu.edu.in.

title: How to Join Clubs
content: How to join clubs at ADYPU: attend the Club Fair at the start of the academic year near the amphitheater, visit the SSD Office, or use QR codes on campus bulletin boards and ERP notifications.

title: NSS (National Service Scheme)
content: National Service Scheme (NSS) at ADYPU: regular activities include 135 hours per year of tree plantation, blood donation camps, cleanliness drives, and seeds sowing. Annual seven-day special camps focus on rural reconstruction and literacy. Long-term village adoption is part of the program. Recent projects include rejuvenation of the Warje Nalla and school wall painting at Solu village. Leadership: Shital Dilip Solanki (Assistant Professor).

title: Governing Board
content: Governing Board of ADYPU: Dr. Ajeenkya D Y Patil (Chairperson, President and Chancellor), Dr. Rakesh Kumar Jain (Vice Chancellor), sponsoring body nominees Mrs. Pooja Patil, Dr. Nandita Palshetkar, Dr. Vijay Khole, Dr. Makarand Jawadekar, expert nominee Mr. Suresh Makhija, Government of Maharashtra nominees Mr. Sadashiv Khade and Adv. Madan Chhajed, industry representatives Mr. Pradyumna Vyas and Dr. Sudhir Mehta, and Dr. Sudhakar Shinde as Permanent Invitee (Registrar).

title: Ph.D. / Doctoral Programs Details
content: ADYPU doctoral programs: Ph.D. programs are offered across Engineering, Management, Law, Liberal Arts, and Design. Duration is minimum 3 years including coursework and maximum 6 years. Women and Persons with Disability above 40 percent may receive up to 2 additional years and maternity/child care leave up to 240 days. Admission process includes notification, eligibility based on a relevant Master's degree with around 55 percent, PET, and a personal interview. PET consists of Paper I Research Methodology (50 percent) and Paper II Subject-Specific (50 percent). Candidates present a research proposal during the interview. The university has over 40 doctoral supervisors in areas such as Graph Theory, Nano-materials, Cyber Security, Consumer Behaviour, and Environmental Economics.

title: Postgraduate Programs Overview
content: ADYPU offers over 50 postgraduate courses across Engineering, Management, Law, Design, Film & Media, Liberal Arts, Hotel Management, and Architecture, with emphasis on experiential learning, research focus, and a global perspective.

title: SOE Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Engineering postgraduate programs: M.Tech in Bio-Engineering, Robotics & Automation, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Space Technology, Infrastructure Engineering, Renewable Engineering, and MCA.

title: SOM Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Management postgraduate programs: MBA specializations include Human Resources, Marketing, Finance, Digital Marketing & E-Commerce, Business Analytics & Data Science, Supply Chain & Logistics Management, International Business, Aviation Management, and Sports Management.

title: SOD Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Design postgraduate programs: M.Des in User Experience (UX) Design, Transportation Design, Product Design, and Fashion Design.

title: SOL Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Law postgraduate programs: LLM specializations in Corporate and Commercial Law, Constitutional and Administrative Law, Criminal and Security Law, and Intellectual Property Law.

title: SOFM Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Film & Media postgraduate programs: M.Sc. in Film & Media with tracks in Film Making and Direction, Media Management, and Animation & VFX, along with MA programs.

title: SOLA Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Liberal Arts postgraduate programs: MA in Psychology, Economics, English, and International Relations.

title: SOHM Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Hotel Management postgraduate program: M.Sc. in Hospitality & Tourism Management.

title: SOA Postgraduate Programs
content: School of Architecture postgraduate program: M.Arch, typically focused on Sustainable Architecture or Environmental Design.
